[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100010001 3
1 000000010 1
2 010100011 4
3 000010101 3
4 010001011 4
5 110011100 5
6 001000110 3
7 101001000 3

12 21 010011110 5

45 54 100001110 4
56 65 100010001 3 match 0
67 76 000000010 1 match 1
70 07 010100011 4 match 2
